title: astragalus humistratus var. sonorae
intro: Astragalus humistratus var. sonorae, also known as Sonoran milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus humistratus var. sonorae can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements.
